title: Chaetocalyx scandens
taxonomy: Chaetocalyx scandens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This species belongs to the genus Chaetocalyx, which is a group of flowering plants. The Chaetocalyx genus is further classified within the subfamily Faboideae. Chaetocalyx scandens is native to tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification is used to identify and differentiate it from other species within the same genus and family.
